compiled_state.title: Write failing tests for dso:ui-designer agent contract and register in .test-index
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Testing mode: RED. Files: tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh, .test-index.

Create test file with 7 named functions (all failing on clean repo). Place in tests/scripts/ for run-all.sh auto-discovery. Function 7 uses temp-dir + explicit --settings/--routing flags to discover-agents.sh (pattern from test-agent-routing-conf.sh lines 119-138).

Named functions:
1. test_ui_designer_agent_file_exists: assert plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md exists
2. test_ui_designer_frontmatter_values: assert name=ui-designer, model=sonnet, description non-empty (value assertions)
3. test_ui_designer_contract_doc_exists: assert plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-return-payload.md exists
4. test_ui_designer_contract_signals: assert contract doc contains CACHE_MISSING and scope_splits
5. test_ui_designer_instructions_contain_cache_missing: assert agent body (post-frontmatter) contains CACHE_MISSING
6. test_ui_designer_instructions_contain_scope_splits: assert agent body contains scope_splits
7. test_ui_designer_routing_entry: copy config/agent-routing.conf to temp dir; create temp settings.json with {enabledPlugins:{}}; run bash plugins/dso/scripts/discover-agents.sh --settings <temp> --routing <temp-conf> 2>/dev/null; assert stdout contains design_creation=dso:ui-designer

.test-index additions (all in one edit):
  plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md:tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh
  plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ui-designer-return-payload.md:tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh
  config/agent-routing.conf:tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh
  [test_ui_designer_agent_file_exists]
  [test_ui_designer_frontmatter_values]
  [test_ui_designer_contract_doc_exists]
  [test_ui_designer_contract_signals]
  [test_ui_designer_instructions_contain_cache_missing]
  [test_ui_designer_instructions_contain_scope_splits]
  [test_ui_designer_routing_entry]

Acceptance criteria:
1. All 7 named functions present in file
2. bash tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh exits non-zero (all 7 assertions fail)
3. .test-index contains 3 source mappings + 7 RED markers
4. bash tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh exits 0 (suite-engine tolerates RED markers)

Verify:
  bash tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh; result=$?; [ $result -ne 0 ] && echo RED confirmed
  bash tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh && echo Suite green RED markers tolerated
